testcase.name: test_cors_preflight_new_domain[https://farforevent.com.ua]

failure.message: AssertionError: Got 400 for origin https://farforevent.com.ua -- body: 'Disallowed CORS origin' assert 400 == 200 + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_cors_new_domain.py:49: in test_cors_preflight_new_domain assert r.status_code == 200, f"Got {r.status_code} for origin {origin} -- body: {r.text!r}" E AssertionError: Got 400 for origin https://farforevent.com.ua -- body: 'Disallowed CORS origin' E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code

failure.message: AssertionError: Got 400 for origin https://www.farforevent.com.ua -- body: 'Disallowed CORS origin' assert 400 == 200 + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
